understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level (without dying), progressing through levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after moving horizontally, gravity automatically carries the character in the gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, reaching '+', or landing on a hazard. CLICK removes clickable/breakable tiles at a specified [x,y] to open paths and can cause immediate falling due to gravity; spikes (u/v) end the attempt if landed on. UNDO reverts the previous action. Levels have limited turns per attempt and only two attempts.
